subject: Cloud Computing
title: On-Demand Self-Service
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on On-Demand Self-Service.

hook.text: Need 50 servers right now? In the old world, that took weeks of purchase orders and shipping.

buildup.text: Cloud computing lets you provision resources instantly, without calling anyone or signing a contract.

discovery.text: NIST defined five traits of cloud. On-demand self-service is number one: you serve yourself.

twist.text: This simplicity hides complexity. Behind one click, thousands of automated systems coordinate.

climax.text: Self-service changed the power dynamic. Developers no longer wait for IT to approve hardware.

punchline.text: The cloud's first promise: get what you need, when you need it.

quiz.question: What does 'on-demand self-service' mean in cloud computing?
options: Users can provision resources instantly without human intervention
Cloud providers send technicians to set up servers on demand
Services are only available during business hours
